creator: kaz@kobe1995.net
text:
>Submitter-Id:	current-users
>Originator:	NAKAMURA Kazushi
>Organization:	PC shop LABBIT
>Confidential:	no
>Synopsis:	ports/30233: update xmbmon port
>Severity:	non-critical
>Priority:	low
>Category:	ports
>Class:		maintainer-update
>Release:	FreeBSD 4.4-RELEASE i386
>Environment:
System: FreeBSD milk.kobe1995.net 4.4-RELEASE FreeBSD 4.4-RELEASE #0: Tue Sep 18 11:57:08 PDT 2001 murray@builder.FreeBSD.org:/usr/src/sys/compile/GENERIC i386
Celeron/667, ECS D6VAA(VIA AppoloPro133A)

>Description:
	Update xmbmon port.
>Fix:
diff -ruN xmbmon/Makefile xmbmon+/Makefile
--- xmbmon/Makefile	Tue Sep  4 02:37:52 2001
+++ xmbmon+/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 19:34:41 2001
@@ -14,18 +14,41 @@
 MAINTAINER=	kaz@kobe1995.net
 
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
-USE_X_PREFIX=	yes
-
 DOCS=	00README.txt	00READMEj.txt	DEBUG_Info	xmbmon.resources
+PLIST=		${WRKDIR}/pkg-plist
+
+WITHOUT_X11?= no
+
+.if (${WITHOUT_X11} == yes)
+MAKE_ARGS+=	WITHOUT_X11=yes DOCSDIR='$(DOCSDIR)' INSTALL_DATA='$(INSTALL_DATA)'
+PLIST=		${PKGDIR}/pkg-plist.noX
+DOCS=   	00README.txt    00READMEj.txt   DEBUG_Info
+.else
+MAKE_ARGS+=	DOCSDIR='$(DOCSDIR)' INSTALL_DATA='$(INSTALL_DATA)'
+.endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
+pre-extract:
+	@${ECHO}
+	@${ECHO} "set WITHOUT_X11 variable to 'yes' if you want to build without X11"
+	@${ECHO}
+
+post-patch:
+	@${MV} -f ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in.X
+.if ${WITHOUT_X11} == yes
+	@${GREP} -v '^PROGRAM+=' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in.X | ${SED} 's/__DOCS__/$(DOCS)/' > ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in
+	@${CP} ${PKGDIR}/pkg-plist.noX ${WRKDIR}/pkg-plist
+.else
+	@${SED} 's/__DOCS__/$(DOCS)/' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in.X > ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in
+	@${CP} ${PKGDIR}/pkg-plist ${WRKDIR}/pkg-plist
+.endif
+	@${RM} -f ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in.X
+
 post-install:
 .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
 	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-.for f in ${DOCS}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${f} ${DOCSDIR}/
-.endfor
+	(cd ${WRKSRC}; ${MAKE} ${MAKE_ARGS} install-doc)
 .endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.post.mk>
diff -ruN xmbmon/files/patch-aa xmbmon+/files/patch-aa
--- xmbmon/files/patch-aa	Tue Sep  4 02:37:52 2001
+++ xmbmon+/files/patch-aa	Wed Sep 19 19:40:07 2001
@@ -1,11 +1,10 @@
 --- Makefile.in.orig	Tue Aug 28 05:43:05 2001
-+++ Makefile.in	Tue Sep  4 02:18:09 2001
-@@ -12,9 +12,10 @@
++++ Makefile.in	Wed Sep 19 19:39:43 2001
+@@ -12,9 +12,9 @@
  
  DEFS=-DHAVE_CONFIG_H
  
 -LIBDIR=/usr/X11R6/lib
-+X11BASE?=/usr/X11R6
 +LIBDIR=$(X11BASE)/lib
  INCDIR=.
 -XINCDIR=/usr/X11R6/include
@@ -13,7 +12,7 @@
  XLIB=-lXaw -lXmu
  EXTENSIONLIB=-lXext
  INCLUDES=-I$(INCDIR)
-@@ -22,9 +23,9 @@
+@@ -22,9 +22,9 @@
  LIBS=-L$(LIBDIR) -lXaw $(XLIB) -lXt $(EXTENSIONLIB) -lX11 -lm
  
  #CC=/compat/linux/usr/bin/gcc
@@ -26,16 +25,41 @@
  LDFLAGS=-s
  
  LINT=lint
-@@ -33,9 +34,9 @@
+@@ -33,14 +33,16 @@
  RM=rm -f
  INSTALL=install
  
 -INST_DIR=/usr/local/bin
 -INST_XDIR=/usr/X11R6/bin
 -INST_XRDIR=/usr/X11R6/lib/X11/app-defaults
-+INST_DIR=$(X11BASE)/bin
-+INST_XDIR=$(X11BASE)/bin
++INST_DIR=$(PREFIX)/bin
++INST_XDIR=$(PREFIX)/bin
 +INST_XRDIR=$(X11BASE)/lib/X11/app-defaults
   
  .c.o:
  	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $*.c
+ 
+-PROGRAM = mbmon xmbmon testpci testsmb testhwm testfan
++PROGRAM = mbmon testpci testsmb testhwm testfan
++DOCS=	__DOCS__
++PROGRAM+= xmbmon
+ 
+ all: $(PROGRAM)
+ 
+@@ -69,8 +71,14 @@
+ 	$(RM) Makefile config.cache config.log config.h config.status
+ 
+ install: $(PROGRAM)
+-	$(INSTALL) -o root -g wheel -m 4555 -c -p mbmon $(INST_DIR)
+-	$(INSTALL) -o root -g wheel -m 4555 -c -p xmbmon $(INST_XDIR)
++	@for i in $(PROGRAM); do \
++		$(INSTALL) -o root -g wheel -m 4555 -c -p $$i $(INST_DIR); \
++	done
+ 
+ lint:
+ 	$(LINT) $(INCLUDES) $(DEFS) $(FONTDEFINES) $(SRCS) -lm
++
++install-doc: $(DOCS)
++	@for f in $(DOCS); do \
++		$(INSTALL_DATA) $$f $(DOCSDIR)/; \
++	done
diff -ruN xmbmon/pkg-plist.noX xmbmon+/pkg-plist.noX
--- xmbmon/pkg-plist.noX	Thu Jan  1 09:00:00 1970
+++ xmbmon+/pkg-plist.noX	Wed Sep 19 16:54:51 2001
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+bin/mbmon
+%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/xmbmon/00README.txt
+%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/xmbmon/00READMEj.txt
+%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/xmbmon/DEBUG_Info
+%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm share/doc/xmbmon
